But this pair is what keeps you looking younger, having more energy, feeling renewed, repairs damage, keeps you burning fat, growing muscle, and your body mass, which is why so many professional athletes, et cetera, take it. But they're trying to get external growth hormone, which is what you inject, right? And once you're doing that, that's not legal. But what sleep multiplier does is it naturally increases your own internal production while you sleep. Okay? So this is a big problem.
